title: The Sky Darkens
description: Luffy fights his way back toward Enel while Nami, Aisa, and the remaining survivors look for a way through the coming destruction.
scene: Across pages 17, 18, this scene focuses on Enel, Luffy, Nami, Aisa, Wyper. Luffy fights his way back toward Enel while Nami, Aisa, and the remaining survivors look for a way through the coming destruction.

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: Yahahaha! But you should already be aware,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I'm quite busy so disappear already!

summary: Luffy fights his way back toward Enel while Nami, Aisa, and the remaining survivors look for a way through the coming destruction.
